creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to p5B2EA84B3 from comment #0)

> battered by testing and bug fixing. 

Please, which non-fixed bugs caused your plea for a separate port? 

Are they mentioned on the freebsd-office list, <https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-office>, or do you suspect that they're upstream bugs?

----

Re: <https://wiki.documentfoundation.org/QA> I might expect battering with nightly builds or tinderboxes (none of which are ported to FreeBSD), but not with stable releases such as 7.4.0, 7.4.1, and 7.4.2. Respectively: 

<https://codeberg.org/FreeBSD/freebsd-ports/commit/1fc4b7db57ed8620821a80c6041faced6146d19f> 
<https://codeberg.org/FreeBSD/freebsd-ports/commit/1eed3ce417e810da00912611d19e1a1d06106394> 
<https://codeberg.org/FreeBSD/freebsd-ports/commit/8b857ccb4b5692cca06b2eec198461dc80b83971>
